description: Composition Dark blue streaked jeans made of a cotton and lycra blend fabric for stretchability, has two insert pockets on the front with a patch pocket inside the right one, two patch pockets on the back with thread detailing, brand tab appliqued on the right pocket at the back, loops on the waist, and has a metal zipper and button closure Fit Slim fit Low rise Tapered leg Wash care Turn inside out before washing and drying Machine wash cold separately using a mild detergent as colour may bleed Do not bleach or wring Tumble dry or dry flat in shade Warm iron If you're a denim person, then these dark blue streaked jeans from wrangler are perfect for you. With a low waist and great slim fit, this pair looks on trend and stays comfortable all day. Team this with feminine tops and stilletos for a chic look. Model statistics The model wears trousers of length 39" Height: 5'8", Waist: 26", Hips: 36"
